emails.subject: Data Validation Check Required - Q1 Data Files
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

We need you to run a validation check on the data files before the quarterly review. Here are the format requirements we agreed on:

Validation Rules:
- CSV files: Must contain commas (our standard delimiter)
- JSON files: Must start with { (proper JSON object format)
- XML files: Must start with < (valid XML declaration or root element)

Please go through all the files in the data directory and create a validation report. We need to know which files pass and which ones fail these basic format checks.

Once you're done, please post a summary to our QA team channel on Slack so everyone is aware of the results.

Thanks,
David Chen
QA Team Lead
